name: upgrade-copilot
description: A Codex plugin that turns risky dependency and framework upgrades into assessed, testable, reviewable PRs.

interface.shortDescription: Upgrade dependencies, frameworks, and CI with less risk.
interface.longDescription: Upgrade Copilot helps developers answer the hard upgrade questions: what is safe to update, what will break, why CI is failing, and how to split the work into reviewable PRs. It combines repository inspection, release-note research, risk scoring, migration plans, and implementation discipline, with a future-ready path for premium migration intelligence and team upgrade programs.
defaultPrompt: Use Upgrade Copilot to find the safest dependency upgrades in this repo.
Use Upgrade Copilot to diagnose why CI started failing after an upgrade.
Use Upgrade Copilot to map breaking changes before we upgrade this framework.
Use Upgrade Copilot to split this migration into small reviewable PRs.
Use Upgrade Copilot to build a team upgrade backlog for this repository.
